docs.title: making webpage for Fab Academy.
docs.text:
This week i will be making webpage by using Github and vscode. I will start by setting it up and personalize it.

I startet by downloading git. then i did download Vscode. Then i downloded python. (codeding language used to program in). Then i downloded pip installer Then i downloaded mcdocks and mckdocks-material.
